name: Meta-Learned TTT + Error-Guided Adaptation Analysis
author: Xiaoan Liu
blurb: Research submission exploring Reptile meta-learning for test-time training initialization and error-guided adaptation strategies under 16MB compression. Key findings: (1) Reptile meta-learning improves SmearGate models by 0.011 BPB (10x naive TTT), (2) Error-guided TTT is a negative result — concentrating adaptation on high-loss tokens does not help, (3) 13-layer models beat 10-layer on 8xH100 despite fewer training steps.
notes: Non-record research submission. Single seed. Sliding window eval stride=64. Base model uses PR#198 recipe (11L, int6, 3x MLP, SmearGate, BigramHash, SWA). Focus is on methodology and findings rather than leaderboard score.
